ns0:entry.ns0:title: BasedHardware/omi
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/BasedHardware/omi
Language: dart
AI that sees your screen, listens to your conversations and tells you what to do

ns0:entry.ns0:title: KaringX/karing
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/KaringX/karing
Language: dart
Simple & Powerful proxy utility, Support routing rules for clash/sing-box

ns0:entry.ns0:title: Predidit/Kazumi
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/Predidit/Kazumi
Language: dart
基于自定义规则的番剧采集APP，支持流媒体在线观看，支持弹幕，支持实时超分辨率。

ns0:entry.ns0:title: TomBursch/kitchenowl
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/TomBursch/kitchenowl
Language: dart
KitchenOwl is a self-hosted grocery list and recipe manager. The backend is made with Flask and the frontend with Flutter. Easily add items to your shopping list before you go shopping. You can also create recipes and add items based on what you want to cook.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: UnboundTechCo/defyxVPN
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/UnboundTechCo/defyxVPN
Language: dart
A modern, secure VPN application built with Flutter that provides internet freedom and privacy protection.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: UnicornsOnLSD/finamp
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/UnicornsOnLSD/finamp
Language: dart
A Jellyfin music client for mobile

ns0:entry.ns0:title: anandnet/Harmony-Music
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/anandnet/Harmony-Music
Language: dart
A cross platform App for streaming Music

ns0:entry.ns0:title: chen08209/FlClash
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/chen08209/FlClash
Language: dart

ns0:entry.ns0:title: dart-lang/sdk
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/dart-lang/sdk
Language: dart
The Dart SDK, including the VM, JS and Wasm compilers, analysis, core libraries, and more.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: dddevid/Musly
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/dddevid/Musly
Language: dart
A beautiful Flutter music streaming client for Subsonic-compatible servers with a modern Apple Music-inspired UI.

URL: https://github.com/flutter/flutter
Language: dart
Flutter makes it easy and fast to build beautiful apps for mobile and beyond

ns0:entry.ns0:title: getlantern/lantern
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/getlantern/lantern
Language: dart
Open-source VPN for speed, privacy, and censorship circumvention. Free to download on Android, iOS, Windows, macOS, and Linux.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: hiddify/hiddify-app
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/hiddify/hiddify-app
Language: dart
Multi-platform auto-proxy client, supporting Sing-box, X-ray, TUIC, Hysteria, Reality, Trojan, SSH etc. It’s an open-source, secure and ad-free.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: imaNNeo/fl_chart
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/imaNNeo/fl_chart
Language: dart
FL Chart is a highly customizable Flutter chart library that supports Line Chart, Bar Chart, Pie Chart, Scatter Chart, Radar Chart and Candlestick Chart.

ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/jameskokoska/Cashew
Language: dart

ns0:entry.ns0:title: mithun50/openclaw-termux
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/mithun50/openclaw-termux
Language: dart
Run OpenClaw AI Gateway on Android — standalone Flutter app with built-in terminal, web dashboard, and one-tap setup. Also available as a Termux CLI package.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: sdegenaar/liquid_glass_widgets
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/sdegenaar/liquid_glass_widgets
Language: dart
Flutter UI kit implementing Apple's iOS 26 Liquid Glass design language — 37 glassmorphic widgets with shader-based rendering, physics-driven animations, and adaptive Impeller/Skia support.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: wanghongenpin/proxypin
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/wanghongenpin/proxypin
Language: dart
Open source free capture HTTP(S) traffic software ProxyPin, supporting full platform systems
